subject: Upgrade AAF to use common Cassandra charts
commit_message:
Upgrade AAF to use common Cassandra charts

Change-Id: I707c41a5e97a7665d22063415aca56a3b3c219df
Issue-ID: OOM-1188
Signed-off-by: prpatel <pradeep.patel2@amdocs.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.
Topic set to Integration of AAF with common cassandra
